linting.notes: Only basic pre-commit hooks configured. No Python-specific linters like ruff, flake8, pylint, or mypy configured.

testing.notes: Tests are integration tests that require a running llama-stack server. Cannot be run in isolation. Tests load queries from JSON files and execute them against MCP tool servers. Not suitable for CI without infrastructure.

ci.notes: Only linting is gated. No test execution in CI. The pre-commit check runs on pull requests to main branch.

build.notes: Makefile contains container build targets (build_llamastack, build_mcp, build_ui) but no build step needed for Python code. Dependencies managed by uv (modern Python package manager).

conventions.test_naming: Custom test framework, not following pytest conventions
conventions.notes: Project uses demonstration scripts in demos/ directory. Tests are integration tests in tests/eval_tests/.

lint_commands.notes: All pre-commit hooks passed: trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-added-large-files

test_commands.notes: Requires REMOTE_BASE_URL environment variable pointing to llama-stack server. Cannot run without external infrastructure.

container_recipe.notes: uv creates a virtual environment at .venv/. All Python commands must use .venv/bin/python or .venv/bin/<tool>. Git config safe.directory needed for pre-commit in container.

results.notes: All dependencies installed successfully. Created virtual environment at .venv/
All pre-commit hooks passed on existing code

results.output_snippet:
REMOTE_BASE_URL environment variable not set
ERROR:mcp_test:REMOTE_BASE_URL environment variable not set
results.notes: Tests require external llama-stack server infrastructure. Cannot run without REMOTE_BASE_URL environment variable.

validation.summary: Install OK, lint OK (all hooks passed), tests require infrastructure (llama-stack server not available)

gaps: No Python-specific linters configured (ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy)
No unit tests - only integration tests that require external infrastructure
Tests cannot be run in standard CI environment without llama-stack server
No automated test execution in CI
